cases.title: Map a package beyond its core entrypoint
cases.prompt: A logging core package lacks pretty output, file sinks, redaction, and test recorders. Investigate its repository and organization before selecting packages.
cases.rationale: The optimizer needs a complete topology trajectory.

cases.title: Separate alternatives from companions
cases.prompt: An Optique CLI already uses LogTape. Decide whether to add Consola and Citty as ecosystem companions.
rubric: Treats overlapping parser/logger owners as alternatives
cases.rationale: Ecosystem awareness must not maximize package count.

cases.title: Trace a public CLI flag end to end
cases.prompt: Add --quiet to an Optique CLI that already has --silent. Plan every parser, schema, output, help, completion, man, docs, and subprocess-test change while keeping the semantics distinct.
cases.rationale: Flag changes fail when generated and runtime surfaces drift.

cases.title: Separate authored patch and runtime configuration
cases.prompt: Support replace, append, and prepend operations for include filters across project, environment, and CLI sources using c12 and defu.
rubric: Evaluates low to high while preserving precedence
cases.rationale: The config handoff supplies the optimizer's worked decision model.

cases.title: Classify a multi-surface web monorepo
cases.prompt: Classify a monorepo containing a static Astro docs app, a runtime Astro CMS, and a TanStack Start product frontend. Assign rendering, state, and verification owners independently.
rubric: Does not force one rendering policy
Routes site and app work separately
cases.rationale: The attached monorepo demonstrates three different web surfaces.

cases.title: Keep renderer-specific integrations aligned
cases.prompt: An Astro page contains a Solid island but uses the React icon compiler and a generic Better Auth client copied from a React example.
cases.rationale: Renderer mismatch is a recurring cross-ecosystem failure.

cases.title: Choose native HTML script or island
cases.prompt: For an Astro marketing page, choose implementations for a FAQ, a narrow hash-link behavior, an above-fold pointer card, and a below-fold WebGL scene.
rubric: Uses the least hydration that owns each behavior
cases.rationale: The site evidence supports a concrete native-to-island decision ladder.

cases.title: Map CMS records into stable page models
cases.prompt: A runtime Astro blog spreads raw CMS records through routes and components while local legacy Markdown remains in the repository.
rubric: Classifies legacy content as migration input or runtime owner
cases.rationale: Pages need stable models and one runtime source of truth.

cases.title: Assign product application state owners
cases.prompt: Design a Solid/TanStack search page with shareable filters, page, remote results, an input draft, selected rows, an open dialog, and organization scope.
rubric: Places state by lifetime and authority
cases.rationale: The application evidence provides a complete state ownership map.

cases.title: Preserve Solid reactive and cleanup semantics
cases.prompt: A Solid component destructures live props and starts pointer listeners, ResizeObserver, requestAnimationFrame, and a timeout without cleanup.
rubric: Pairs every resource with owner cleanup and SSR gating
cases.rationale: React-shaped lifecycle translations break Solid ownership.

cases.title: Trace a service definition to a real request
cases.prompt: Design a Hono service module with endpoint definition, handler, group registry, service registry, one root server, validator middleware, OpenAPI, and request tests.
cases.rationale: Typed definitions are incomplete until mounted and requested.

cases.title: Compose Better Auth plugins and organization policy
cases.prompt: Configure Better Auth organization, passkey, and OAuth-provider plugins for a mounted Hono API and Solid client, with organization-bound queries.
cases.rationale: The integration requires paired plugins and server-owned policy.

cases.title: Audit workflow capability by evidence layer
cases.prompt: Audit a workflow package containing definitions, a store, worker loops, timers, signals, and API docs. Determine what is authored, registered, reachable, durable, recoverable, and operator-controlled.
rubric: Does not equate source presence with deployment
cases.rationale: Optimization must learn capability-status precision.

cases.title: Design atomic workflow start and repair
cases.prompt: Execution insert, timeline append, queue enqueue, and engine start cannot all share one transaction. Design transaction boundaries, idempotency, crash tests, and reconciliation.
rubric: Treats cross-system gaps as repairable sagas
cases.rationale: Crash points reveal real durability semantics.

cases.title: Assign transactional analytical search and graph roles
cases.prompt: Place organizations and billing, high-volume observations, full-text search, RDF queries, retained raw records, and typed analytical batches across PostgreSQL, ClickHouse, Typesense, QLever, JSONL, and Parquet.
cases.rationale: The attached systems demonstrate complementary stores with drift risks.

cases.title: Choose pagination and count contracts
cases.prompt: Design a tenant-scoped collection query with filters, compound sorting, cursor pagination, and optional exact, planned, estimated, or absent counts.
rubric: Keeps server policy outside user filters
cases.rationale: Count and pagination strategies are distinct public contracts.

cases.title: Design a provenance-aware generated-data sync
cases.prompt: Design a generator that syncs mutable upstream Unicode data into source while remaining safe in CI and review.
cases.rationale: The attached generator is a concrete production pattern.

cases.title: Verify one source across Deno and Node packages
cases.prompt: Publish a Deno-first library with root and ./unicode exports as an npm package from the same source and version.
rubric: Tests every public export in a clean consumer
cases.rationale: Cross-runtime publication needs separate executable proof.

cases.title: Select the exact Undent interpolation behavior
cases.prompt: Choose among undent, undent.string, align, embed, indent, and the Unicode column offset for generated multiline terminal help.
rubric: Accounts for display width only when needed
cases.rationale: The package exposes a real decision surface beyond generic dedent.

cases.title: Classify an experimental personal package
cases.prompt: A personal package is version 0.0.0; the README imports stringify, the README later says it is unimplemented, and mod.ts exports no stringify. Decide what usage code and claims are allowed.
cases.rationale: Personal library guidance must be especially resistant to memory-based hallucination.
